scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w mobile" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w mobile"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w mobile && npm run build -w web
